Organism: Mycolicibacterium hassiacum (strain DSM 44199 / CIP 105218 / JCM 12690 / 3849) (Mycobacterium hassiacum)
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase superfamily. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=3,3'-di-O-methyl-4alpha-mannobiose + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 1,3,3'-tri-O-methyl-4alpha-mannobiose + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:62408, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:145745, ChEBI:CHEBI:145746; EC=2.1.1.365; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:30606802}; PhysiologicalDirection=left-to-right; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:62409; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:30606802};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Involved in the biosynthesis of 3-O-methylmannose polysaccharides (MMP), which are intracellular polymethylated polysaccharides implicated in the modulation of fatty acid metabolism in non-tuberculous mycobacteria (PubMed:30606802). Specifically methylates the 1-OH position of 3,3'-di-O-methyl-4alpha-mannobiose, a probable early precursor of MMP, yielding the reducing end dimannoside of MMP (PubMed:30606802). {ECO:0000269|PubMed:30606802}.
